allow: Bash(git init:*)
WebFetch(domain:blog.emilburzo.com)
WebFetch(domain:www.agentic-engineer.com)
WebFetch(domain:claudefa.st)
WebFetch(domain:paddo.dev)
WebFetch(domain:www.joinformal.com)
WebFetch(domain:medium.com)
WebFetch(domain:docs.claude.com)
WebFetch(domain:api.github.com)
Bash(do echo "=== COMMENT $id ===" gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/comments/$id -q '.body')

Bash(# Reply to all comments in sequence using correct API reply\(\) { local id=""$1"" body=""$2"" gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments -X POST \\ -f body=""$body"" -F in_reply_to=""$id"")

Bash(# swift.py resolved paths gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments -X POST \\ -f body=""Fixed in d5b166d. All checkers now capture shutil.which\(\) return value and pass the resolved absolute path to subprocess.run\(\)."" \\ -F in_reply_to=2821515278)

Bash(# comment_stripper prefix code \(P1\) gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments -X POST \\ -f body=""Fixed in d5b166d. Multi-line block comments starting mid-line now preserve the code before the block comment marker."" \\ -F in_reply_to=2821434846)

Bash(# Check which comments still don''t have our replies gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate -q '' [.[] | select\(.path | test\(""next-level/""\)\) | {id: .id, path: .path, line: \(.line // .original_line\), user: .user.login}] | group_by\(.path + "":"" + \(.line|tostring\)\) | map\(select\(length == 1 and .[0].user != ""George-RD""\)\) | .[] | .[0] | ""\\\(.id\)|\\\(.path\):\\\(.line\)"" '')

Bash(# Find comments from coderabbitai that don''t have replies from George-RD gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate | jq -r '' [.[] | select\(.path | test\(""next-level/""\)\)] | group_by\(.in_reply_to_id // .id\) | map\(select\( \(.[0].user.login == ""coderabbitai""\) and \(map\(select\(.user.login == ""George-RD""\)\) | length == 0\) \)\) | .[] | .[0] | ""\\\(.id\)|\\\(.path\):\\\(.line // .original_line\)|\\\(.body | split\(""\\n""\)[0][:80]\)"" '')
Bash(# Get top-level CodeRabbit comments \(no in_reply_to_id\) and check for our replies gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Count: total top-level CodeRabbit comments vs ones with replies gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Check all unique comment authors and in_reply_to patterns gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Find unreplied CodeRabbit comments \(using correct bot username\) gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(do echo "=== $id ===" gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/comments/$id -q '.body')

Bash(# startup-check cd bug gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments -X POST \\ -f body=""Fixed in feba232. Added non-empty guard around cd to prevent navigating to HOME when config_root is empty."" \\ -F in_reply_to=2823897245)
WebFetch(domain:www.vibesparking.com)
Bash(# Check for new unreplied CodeRabbit comments gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(do)
Bash(echo:*)

Bash(# Reply to both comments gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments -X POST \\ -f body=""Fixed in a92e3b8. Moved sort -u inside the process substitution so the while loop runs in the current shell and has_impl_edits persists."" \\ -F in_reply_to=2826519112)
Bash(# Check for new unreplied comments after the latest review gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Get ALL CodeRabbit comments \(top-level only\), check reply status, and show which are still unresolved gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Check Codex comments gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Check general PR comments \(issue comments, not review comments\) gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/issues/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# Check review status gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/reviews)
Bash(# Continue - there are more gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/reviews)

Bash(# Get ALL CodeRabbit comments, categorize by whether they''re on v3-new files vs pre-existing, and check what our reply said gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Bash(# For the ""acknowledged/pre-existing"" ones, check if we ALSO have a ""Fixed"" reply gh api repos/George-RD/claude-next-level/pulls/17/comments --paginate)
Skill(pr-review-toolkit:review-pr)
